box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ✅ 正解 A/B: HTTP API は REST API より 70% 安価・低レイテンシ。Lambda で複数テーブル集約・入力検証が柔軟。完全サーバーレスで運用負荷ゼロ。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 236, 234), rgb(42, 28, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(221, 52, 76), rgb(255, 127, 147));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 381px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ❌ API Gateway → DynamoDB 直接統合: JOIN 不可・レスポンス整形困難・パス設計が肥大化

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 236, 234), rgb(42, 28, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(221, 52, 76), rgb(255, 127, 147));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 381px; margin-left: 502px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ❌ ECS/EKS でホスト: 常時稼働コストと運用工数が過大。パートナー API のトラフィックにフィットしない

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 235), rgb(32, 24, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 153, 0), rgb(175, 87, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 938px; height: 1px; padding-top: 441px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 📌 HTTP API vs REST API: HTTP API は JWT/OIDC 認可・CORS・低コスト。REST API は WAF/API キー/使用量プラン。要件で選ぶ。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 242, 253), rgb(23, 32, 41)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 72, 204), rgb(152, 163, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 938px; height: 1px; padding-top: 491px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 💡 1 Lambda で集約パターン: パラメータ別にテーブル選択 → 複数 GetItem/Query を Promise.all で並列化しレイテンシ最小化
